name: Robert
summary: Robert is a software engineer building an AI map tool. Loves tennis and hackathons.
relationship_goal: stay in touch, collaborate on AI projects

name: Dana
summary: Dana is a physical therapist who runs ultramarathons. Obsessed with trail running and recovery science.

name: Marcus
summary: Marcus is a jazz musician and music teacher. Huge into vinyl, jazz clubs, and cooking elaborate meals.
relationship_goal: catch a jazz show together, grab dinner

name: Priya
where_met: book club at Capitol Hill Books
summary: Priya is a UX researcher who reads obsessively. Into literary fiction, manga, and pop-up events.
relationship_goal: go to pop-ups and markets together, swap book recs

name: James
where_met: a startup networking event in Seattle
summary: James is a founder building a sustainable clothing brand. Into cycling, coffee, and anything local and independent.
relationship_goal: swap startup advice, grab coffee when he's in Seattle

name: Sofia
summary: Sofia is a graphic designer who does ceramics on the side. Loves art shows, concerts, and anything tactile and handmade.
relationship_goal: go to art shows and markets together
